name: Reuben Roll-em-Ups
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the Swiss cheese with the sauerkraut.
2. Spread a thin layer of mustard on each pastrami slice.
3. Heap a generous spoonful of the cheese-sauerkraut mixture onto each slice of pastrami.
4. Roll the meat tightly and skewer it through the center with a cellophane-tipped toothpick.
5. Refrigerate until serving time. Makes 30.
Special Hints: For some vibrant color, dice a whole pimiento and add it to the sauerkraut mixture.
